title: newbouldia laevis
intro: Newbouldia laevis, also known as the African Bloodroot, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in West African medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its roots and leaves. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its potential health benefits of reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of Newbouldia laevis can be made into a tea or a tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
